message:
🐛 Persist tile selections and active terminal across restarts (#136)

- Fix race condition: saveCheckedSessions() was called with empty tabs
  on mount, overwriting localStorage before fetch completed
- Add ACTIVE_TERMINAL_KEY to persist which terminal was last active
  (stored by tmuxSession name so it survives server restarts)
- Restore previously active terminal tab on page load instead of
  always defaulting to the first tab
- tileMode was already persisted via TILE_MODE_KEY

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
